## Summary

<!-- What changed, and why? Keep the pull request focused. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature or signal
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests, tooling, or maintenance

## Platform impact

- [ ] Android
- [ ] iOS
- [ ] JavaScript or TypeScript only
- [ ] No runtime impact

## Privacy and security impact

<!-- Describe permissions, sensitive data, store-policy implications, and possible misuse. Write "None" if not applicable. -->

## Verification

<!-- List the checks, devices, emulators, or simulators used. -->

- [ ] `npm run verify`
- [ ] The example app was tested when runtime behavior changed

## Checklist

- [ ] I read and followed `CONTRIBUTING.md` and the Code of Conduct.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I updated documentation and the changelog when needed.
- [ ] Native changes cover both platforms or include an explicit fallback.
- [ ] This change does not include credentials, personal data, private endpoints, or generated build output.
